summary: Backend monetization regression passed for Stripe checkout session and initial status flows; frontend premium/navigation checks were blocked by Expo preview outage caused by Stripe config plugin startup failure.

integration_issues.issue: Preview returned 502 and 'The preview environment is not responding'. Supervisor shows expo in BACKOFF (not running), so UI flows were not reachable.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo process crashes with TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'merchantIdentifier') from @stripe/stripe-react-native plugin, causing supervisor BACKOFF and blocking web preview.

action_items: Fix Expo startup crash from @stripe/stripe-react-native plugin configuration (merchantIdentifier) so supervisor expo stays RUNNING.
After preview is stable, retest settings -> premium navigation and premium CTA/button visibility on mobile viewport.
Keep Stripe checkout-session backend flow as-is (already passing) while resolving frontend runtime/plugin crash.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/app.json includes @stripe/stripe-react-native plugin without required iOS merchantIdentifier config, which crashes Expo startup in this environment.
/app/backend/server.py remains very large (>1600 lines); route/service split is recommended to reduce regression risk.

success_rate.frontend: 0% of requested UI checks executed successfully (blocked by preview startup failure)

seed_data_creation: Checkout tests created Stripe checkout sessions and transaction records via normal API flow; no manual seed fixtures added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend checkout session + status endpoints are working on public base URL, including expected open/unpaid initial status. Frontend test attempts failed twice due 502 preview outage; supervisor shows expo BACKOFF with Stripe plugin merchantIdentifier error in expo.err logs.
rca_of_issue: Reproduction: open https://ai-freq-preview.preview.emergentagent.com -> 502 preview not responding, and Playwright times out waiting for home testID. Supervisor status reports expo BACKOFF. expo.err repeatedly logs TypeError in @stripe/stripe-react-native config plugin: reading merchantIdentifier. Mitigation: correct Stripe plugin configuration (or remove plugin if not needed for web checkout-session approach) so Expo can boot and premium UI can be retested.
test_credentials: No auth flow in this scope. /app/memory/test_credentials.md exists but has no credentials.
